properties.SQL select query:
SELECT [ComputerID] as computer_id
      ,[Name] as name
      ,[Value] as value
      ,[IsFailure] as is_failure
	  --, cast(${timestamp:divide(1000)} as bigint) timestamp
  FROM [BFEnterprise].[dbo].[BES_COLUMN_HEADINGS]

SELECT [employee_number]
	  ,[person_type]
      ,[building]
      ,[city]
      ,[company]
      ,[cost_centre]
      ,[cost_centre_description]
      ,[country]
      ,[country_code]
      ,[department]
      ,[division]
      ,[extended_leaver]
      ,[col_function]
      ,[functional_title]
      ,[leave_date]
      ,[leaver_processed]
      ,[login_name]
      ,[middle_name]
      ,[network_login]
      ,[permanent_staff]
      ,[person_id]
      ,[primary_account]
      ,[region]
      ,[identity_role]
      ,[start_date]
      ,[team]
      ,[name]
      ,[description]
      ,[protected]
      ,[iiqlock]
      ,[lm_employee_number]
      ,[LineManager]
      ,[display_name]
      ,[firstname]
      ,[lastname]
      ,[email]
      ,[manager_status]
      ,[known_as]
      ,[SMT] as smt
      ,[SMTEmployeeNumber] as smt_employee_number
      ,[lm_department]
      ,[legal_entity]
      ,[LEGAL_ENTITY_DESCRIPTION] AS [legal_entity_description]
  FROM [InfoSec].[myAccess].[Panaseer_Identities_dev]

/****** Script for SelectTopNRows command from SSMS  ******/
SELECT [IdentityId] id
      ,[Identity] employee_id
      ,[native_identity] 
      ,[Account] username
	  ,[ApplicationName] application
  FROM [InfoSec].[myAccess].[PanaseerIdentityMapper]

properties.sql-pre-query:
SELECT top 1 
[Org Role] AS ORG_ROLE,
[i_server_guid] AS I_SERVER_GUID,
[App Role Display Name] AS APP_ROLE_DISPLAY_NAME,
[App Role Name] AS APP_ROLE_NAME,
[App Role CreatedDate] AS APP_ROLE_CREATED_DATE,
[App Role ModifiedDate] AS APP_ROLE_MODIFIED_DATE,
[Disabled] AS DISABLED,
[App role Approver] AS APP_ROLE_APPROVER,
[role_secondary_approver] AS ROLE_SECONDARY_APPROVER,
[department] AS DEPARTMENT, 
[cost_centre] AS COST_CENTRE,
[Type] AS TYPE,
[Role Type] AS ROLE_TYPE,
[IT Role Display Name] AS IT_ROLE_DISPLAY_NAME,
[IT Role Name] AS IT_ROLE_NAME,
[IT Role CreatedDate] AS IT_ROLE_CREATED_DATE,
[IT Role ModifiedDate] AS IT_ROLE_MODIFIED_DATE,
[IT role Approver] AS IT_ROLE_APPROVER,
[Application] AS APPLICATION,
[Entitlements] AS ENTITLEMENTS
from [InfoSec].[myAccess].[AllRoleMakeUp_extended]
properties.SQL select query:
select
[Org Role] AS ORG_ROLE,
[i_server_guid] AS I_SERVER_GUID,
[App Role Display Name] AS APP_ROLE_DISPLAY_NAME,
[App Role Name] AS APP_ROLE_NAME,
[App Role CreatedDate] AS APP_ROLE_CREATED_DATE,
[App Role ModifiedDate] AS APP_ROLE_MODIFIED_DATE,
[Disabled] AS DISABLED,
[App role Approver] AS APP_ROLE_APPROVER,
[role_secondary_approver] AS ROLE_SECONDARY_APPROVER,
[department] AS DEPARTMENT, 
[cost_centre] AS COST_CENTRE,
[Type] AS TYPE,
[Role Type] AS ROLE_TYPE,
[IT Role Display Name] AS IT_ROLE_DISPLAY_NAME,
[IT Role Name] AS IT_ROLE_NAME,
[IT Role CreatedDate] AS IT_ROLE_CREATED_DATE,
[IT Role ModifiedDate] AS IT_ROLE_MODIFIED_DATE,
[IT role Approver] AS IT_ROLE_APPROVER,
[Application] AS APPLICATION,
[Entitlements] AS ENTITLEMENTS
from [InfoSec].[myAccess].[AllRoleMakeUp_extended]

properties.query:
SELECT
      V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID as resource_id,
      V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceType as resource_type,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Active0 as active,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Client0 as client,
      V_R_SYSTEM_VALID.AD_Site_Name0 as ad_site_name,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Client_Type0 as client_type,
      V_R_SYSTEM.CPUType0 as cpu_type,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Creation_Date0 as creation_date,
      V_R_SYSTEM.DeviceOwner0 as device_owner,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Distinguished_Name0 as distinguished_name,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Full_Domain_Name0 as full_domain_name,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Is_Assigned_To_User0 as is_assigned_to_user,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Last_Logon_Timestamp0 as last_logon_timestamp,
      V_R_SYSTEM.User_Domain0 as user_domain,
      V_R_SYSTEM.User_name0 as user_name,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Name0 as name,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Hardware_ID0 as hardware_id,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Netbios_Name0 as netbios_name,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Operating_System_Name_and0 as os,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Resource_Domain_OR_Workgr0 as resource_domain,
      V_R_SYSTEM.Is_Virtual_Machine0 as is_virtual_machine,
      V_GS_COMPUTER_SYSTEM.TimeStamp as update_timestamp,
	  V_CombinedDeviceResources.LastActiveTime as last_active_timestamp,
      V_GS_COMPUTER_SYSTEM.Manufacturer0 as manufacturer,
      V_GS_COMPUTER_SYSTEM.Model0 as model,
      V_GS_WORKSTATION_STATUS.LastHWScan as last_hw_scan,
      V_GS_SYSTEM_ENCLOSURE.ChassisTypes0 as chassis_types,
      V_GS_OPERATING_SYSTEM.Caption0 as os_caption,
      V_GS_OPERATING_SYSTEM.ServicePackMajorVersion0 as os_service_pack_major_version,
      V_GS_OPERATING_SYSTEM.ServicePackMinorVersion0 as os_service_pack_minor_version,
      V_GS_OPERATING_SYSTEM.CSDVersion0 as os_csd_version,
      V_NETWORK_DATA_SERIALIZED.DNSDomain0 as dns_domain,
      V_NETWORK_DATA_SERIALIZED.DNSHostName0 as dns_host_name,
      cast(V_NETWORK_DATA_SERIALIZED.IPAddress0 as varchar) as ip_address,
      V_NETWORK_DATA_SERIALIZED.MACAddress0 as mac_address,
      V_GS_PC_BIOS.SerialNumber0 as serial_number,
      cast(V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID as varchar) as datasrc_resource_id,
      cast(${timestamp:divide(1000)} as bigint) datasrc_tstamp,
      '${datasrc.type}'     as datasrc_type,
      '${datasrc.vendor}'   as datasrc_vendor,
      '${datasrc.version}'  as datasrc_version,
      '${database.name}'    as datasrc_instance,
      '${database.name}'    as datasrc_endpoint,
      cast(${timestamp:divide(1000)} as bigint) timestamp,
      cast(${timestamp:format('yyyyMMdd')} as varchar) dt
FROM
V_R_SYSTEM
	LEFT JOIN
	V_R_SYSTEM_VALID ON V_R_SYSTEM_VALID.ResourceID = V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID
	LEFT JOIN
	V_GS_COMPUTER_SYSTEM      ON V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID = V_GS_COMPUTER_SYSTEM.ResourceID
	LEFT JOIN
	V_GS_WORKSTATION_STATUS   ON V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID = V_GS_WORKSTATION_STATUS.ResourceID
	LEFT JOIN
	V_GS_SYSTEM_ENCLOSURE     ON V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID =
	V_GS_SYSTEM_ENCLOSURE.ResourceID and V_GS_SYSTEM_ENCLOSURE.Tag0 = 'System Enclosure 0'
	LEFT JOIN
	V_GS_OPERATING_SYSTEM     ON V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID = V_GS_OPERATING_SYSTEM.ResourceID
	LEFT JOIN
    V_NETWORK_DATA_SERIALIZED ON V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID = V_NETWORK_DATA_SERIALIZED.ResourceID and V_NETWORK_DATA_SERIALIZED.Index0 = 7
    LEFT JOIN
    (select distinct ResourceID, SerialNumber0 from V_GS_PC_BIOS ) V_GS_PC_BIOS ON V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID = V_GS_PC_BIOS.ResourceID
	LEFT JOIN
	V_CombinedDeviceResources on V_R_SYSTEM.ResourceID = V_CombinedDeviceResources.MachineID
properties.schema.name: sccm_device

properties.query:
SELECT  dbo.v_R_System.Name0
       ,dbo.v_GS_INSTALLED_SOFTWARE.ProductName0
       ,dbo.v_GS_INSTALLED_SOFTWARE.ProductVersion0
       ,cast(${timestamp:format('yyyyMMdd')} as varchar) dt
 ,cast(${timestamp:divide(1000)} as bigint) timestamp
    
FROM   dbo.v_R_System INNER JOIN
       dbo.v_GS_INSTALLED_SOFTWARE ON dbo.v_R_System.ResourceID = dbo.v_GS_INSTALLED_SOFTWARE.ResourceID
properties.schema.name: sccm_installed_software

properties.query:
SELECT [ResourceID]
     ,[Version0] AS [Version]
     ,CAST ([Enabled0] AS Bit) AS [Enabled]
     ,[ProductStatus0] AS [ProductStatus]
     ,CAST ([RtpEnabled0] AS Bit) AS [RtpEnabled]
     ,[RealTimeScanDirection0] AS [RealTimeScanDirection]
     ,CAST ([OnAccessProtectionEnabled0] AS Bit) AS [OnAccessProtectionEnabled]
     ,CAST ([IoavProtectionEnabled0] AS Bit) AS [IoavProtectionEnabled]
     ,CAST ([BehaviorMonitorEnabled0] AS Bit) AS [BehaviorMonitorEnabled]
     ,CAST ([AntivirusEnabled0] AS Bit) AS [AntivirusEnabled]
     ,CAST ([AntispywareEnabled0] AS Bit) AS [AntispywareEnabled]
     ,[EngineVersion0] AS [EngineVersion]
     ,[LastQuickScanDateTimeStart0] AS [LastQuickScanDateTimeStart]
     ,[LastFullScanDateTimeStart0] AS [LastFullScanDateTimeStart]
     ,[LastQuickScanDateTimeEnd0] AS [LastQuickScanDateTimeEnd]
     ,[LastFullScanDateTimeEnd0] AS [LastFullScanDateTimeEnd]
     ,[LastFullScanAge0] AS [LastFullScanAge]
     ,[LastQuickScanAge0] AS [LastQuickScanAge]
     ,[LastQuickScanSource0] AS [LastQuickScanSource]
     ,[LastFullScanSource0] AS [LastFullScanSource]
     ,[AntivirusSignatureUpdateDate0] AS [AntivirusSignatureUpdateDateTime]
     ,[AntispywareSignatureUpdateDa0] AS [AntispywareSignatureUpdateDateTime]
     ,[AntivirusSignatureAge0] AS [AntivirusSignatureAge]
     ,[AntispywareSignatureAge0] AS [AntispywareSignatureAge]
     ,[AntivirusSignatureVersion0] AS [AntivirusSignatureVersion]
     ,[AntispywareSignatureVersion0] AS [AntispywareSignatureVersion]
     ,CAST ([NisEnabled0] AS Bit) AS [NisEnabled]
     ,[NisEngineVersion0] AS [NisEngineVersion]
     ,[NisSignatureVersion0] AS [NisSignatureVersion]
     ,cast(${timestamp:divide(1000)} as bigint) timestamp
     ,cast(${timestamp:format('yyyyMMdd')} as varchar) dt
FROM [dbo].[v_GS_AntimalwareHealthStatus]
properties.schema.name: sccm_antimalware

properties.query:
SELECT B.name0 AS name
      ,B.Domain0 AS domain
      ,B.SystemRole0 AS device_type
      ,A.ProtectionStatus00 AS protection_status
      ,C.System_OU_Name0 AS system_ou_name
      ,cast(${timestamp:divide(1000)} as bigint) timestamp
      ,cast(${timestamp:format('yyyyMMdd')} as varchar) dt
FROM (SELECT * FROM dbo.ENCRYPTABLE_VOLUME_DATA) A
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM dbo.System_DATA) B ON A.MachineID = B.MachineID
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM dbo.System_System_OU_Name_ARR) C ON A.MachineID = C.ItemKey
properties.schema.name: sccm_encryption

properties.query:
SELECT [Computer Name] AS [computer_name],
       [PolicyName],
       [PolicyApplicationState],
       [onboardingState] AS [onboarding_state],
	   CAST([onAccessProtectionEnabled0] AS bit) AS [onAccessProtectionEnabled],
       cast(${timestamp:divide(1000)} AS BIGINT) timestamp,
       cast(${timestamp:format('yyyyMMdd')} as varchar) dt
FROM dbo.[Defender Report]
properties.schema.name: sccm_defender_policy

properties.query:
SELECT DISTINCT OPR.name,
    CASE WHEN OPR.MacroInventory = '3' THEN 'Macro Present'
         WHEN OPR.MacroInventory = '1' THEN 'No Macro Present'
         WHEN OPR.MacroInventory = '4' THEN 'Needs Review'
         ELSE 'Other' END AS 'Macro_Readiness'
FROM dbo.vSMS_OfficeProplusReadiness OPR
GROUP BY OPR.MacroInventory, OPR.Name
properties.schema.name: sccm_macro_readiness_report

processors.name: MS Security Center Alerts Query Generation

properties.generate-ff-custom-text: { "Query" : "let avmodetable = DeviceTvmSecureConfigurationAssessment | where ConfigurationId == 'scid-2010' and isnotnull(Context) | extend avdata=parsejson(Context) | extend AVMode = iif(tostring(avdata[0][0]) == '0', 'Active' , iif(tostring(avdata[0][0]) == '1', 'Passive' ,iif(tostring(avdata[0][0]) == '4', 'EDR Blocked' ,'Unknown'))) | project DeviceId, AVMode; let QST = DeviceTvmInfoGathering | where isnotempty(AdditionalFields.AvScanResults) | extend ScanResults = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).AvScanResults) | mv-expand QuickScanResults = parse_json(ScanResults).Quick | where QuickScanResults.ScanStatus == 'Completed' | mv-expand LastQuickScan = parse_json(ScanResults).Quick | where LastQuickScan contains 'Timestamp'  | project DeviceId, LastQuickScanTime = todatetime(LastQuickScan.Timestamp); let FST =  DeviceTvmInfoGathering  | where isnotempty(AdditionalFields.AvScanResults)  | extend ScanResults = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).AvScanResults) | mv-expand FullScanResults = parse_json(ScanResults).Full | where FullScanResults.ScanStatus == 'Completed' | mv-expand LastFullScan = parse_json(ScanResults).Full | where LastFullScan contains 'Timestamp' | project DeviceId, LastFullScanTime = todatetime(LastFullScan.Timestamp); search in (DeviceEvents) ActionType == 'AntivirusScanCompleted' | order by Timestamp | extend fields=parse_json(AdditionalFields) | extend scanType = tostring(fields['ScanTypeIndex']) | distinct DeviceId,Timestamp,DeviceName,scanType | join (DeviceTvmSecureConfigurationAssessment) on DeviceId | where ConfigurationId == 'scid-2011' and isnotnull(Context) | extend avdata=parsejson(Context) | extend AVSigVersion = tostring(avdata[0][0]) | extend AVEngineVersion = tostring(avdata[0][1]) | extend AVSigLastUpdateTime = tostring(avdata[0][2]) | project DeviceId, DeviceName, OSPlatform, AVSigVersion, AVEngineVersion, AVSigLastUpdateTime, IsCompliant, IsApplicable | join avmodetable on DeviceId | join QST on DeviceId | join FST on DeviceId"}

properties.generate-ff-custom-text: { "Query" : "let avmodetable = DeviceTvmSecureConfigurationAssessment | where ConfigurationId == 'scid-2010' and isnotnull(Context) | extend avdata=parsejson(Context) | extend AVMode = iif(tostring(avdata[0][0]) == '0', 'Active' , iif(tostring(avdata[0][0]) == '1', 'Passive' ,iif(tostring(avdata[0][0]) == '4', 'EDR Blocked' ,'Unknown'))) | project DeviceId, AVMode; let QST = DeviceTvmInfoGathering | where isnotempty(AdditionalFields.AvScanResults) | extend ScanResults = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).AvScanResults) | mv-expand QuickScanResults = parse_json(ScanResults).Quick | where QuickScanResults.ScanStatus == 'Completed' | mv-expand LastQuickScan = parse_json(ScanResults).Quick | where LastQuickScan contains 'Timestamp'  | project DeviceId, LastQuickScanTime = todatetime(LastQuickScan.Timestamp); let FST =  DeviceTvmInfoGathering  | where isnotempty(AdditionalFields.AvScanResults)  | extend ScanResults = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).AvScanResults) | mv-expand FullScanResults = parse_json(ScanResults).Full | where FullScanResults.ScanStatus == 'Completed' | mv-expand LastFullScan = parse_json(ScanResults).Full | where LastFullScan contains 'Timestamp' | project DeviceId, LastFullScanTime = todatetime(LastFullScan.Timestamp); search in (DeviceEvents) ActionType == 'AntivirusScanCompleted' | order by Timestamp | extend fields=parse_json(AdditionalFields) | extend scanType = tostring(fields['ScanTypeIndex']) | distinct DeviceId,Timestamp,DeviceName,scanType | join (DeviceTvmSecureConfigurationAssessment) on DeviceId | where ConfigurationId == 'scid-2011' and isnotnull(Context) | extend avdata=parsejson(Context) | extend AVSigVersion = tostring(avdata[0][0]) | extend AVEngineVersion = tostring(avdata[0][1]) | extend AVSigLastUpdateTime = tostring(avdata[0][2]) | project DeviceId, DeviceName, OSPlatform, AVSigVersion, AVEngineVersion, AVSigLastUpdateTime, IsCompliant, IsApplicable | join avmodetable on DeviceId | join QST on DeviceId | join FST on DeviceId"}
